name: codex-coordinator
description: Give each Codex task a clear job and boundaries that stop duplicate work.

interface.longDescription: Give Coordinator one goal. It reuses the right existing tasks before opening another, gives each task a clear job, and shows who is doing what. You get less duplicate work and fewer crossed edits, without an always-on manager or copied chats.
defaultPrompt: Help my Codex tasks finish this goal with less duplicate work and fewer crossed edits
Show me who is working on what and flag work that may collide
Reuse the right existing tasks for this goal and keep each task focused
